---
title: "<i>Mothers’ Union Journal, The</i>"
---

## <i>Mothers’ Union Journal, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical, which ran under this name 1888-1954, was aimed at the working-class members of the Mothers’ Union, as distinct from the educated readers of <i>Mothers in Council</i>.  It changed its name to <i>Home and Family</i> in 1954 and in 2008 to <i>Families First</i> and currently (2010) is also published online:
http://www.themothersunion.org/familiesfirst.aspx

The first editor was Madalene Sabine (Pasley) Jenkyns (1847/8-1935).

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
